penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. Final suture cut was not observed within the time limit.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude reported incomplete task at 600 seconds while GPT reported completion at 210 seconds. Given the fundamental disagreement and Claude's specific observation that the final suture cut was not visible, the incomplete task determination takes precedence per rubric rules.

disagreements.rationale: Claude specifically noted that the final suture cut phase was not visible, which is required for task completion. This observation supports the incomplete task determination.

claude_value.description: Maximum time reached before completion. Final suture cut was not observed within the time limit.

gpt_value.description: The knot appears to slip slightly when tension is applied, but remains intact.
A visible hand switch between throws seems to have been missed.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task penalty supersedes all other penalties per rubric. If the task was not completed, specific technique penalties become irrelevant.
Claude's specific observation that the final suture cut was not visible contradicts GPT's inclusion of this phase. The absence of visible completion supports the incomplete task determination.
Incomplete task penalty results in automatic zero score regardless of time or other penalties.
